basic_details.job_title: Sri Venkateswara College Delhi Junior Assistant-cum-Caretaker Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Sri Venkateswara College Delhi Junior Assistant-cum-Caretaker Notification 2026 has been released on 20 July 2026 on the official website https://svc.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Sri Venkateswara College Delhi Junior Assistant-cum-Caretaker Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: A Bachelor's Degree from any recognized institute/University, English Typing @35 wpm or Hindi Typing @30 wpm, Proficiency in Computer Operations, Proficiency in accounting software
qualification.details: A Bachelor's Degree from any recognized institute/University. English Typing @35 wpm or Hindi Typing @30 wpm. Proficiency in Computer Operations. Proficiency in accounting software.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Sri Venkateswara College Delhi Junior Assistant-cum-Caretaker Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 02-08-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Sri Venkateswara College Delhi Junior Assistant-cum-Caretaker Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Sri Venkateswara College Delhi Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Sri Venkateswara College Delhi Junior Assistant-cum-Caretaker Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Sri Venkateswara College Delhi Junior Assistant-cum-Caretaker Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: A Bachelor's Degree from any recognized institute/University. English Typing @35 wpm or Hindi Typing @30 wpm. Proficiency in Computer Operations. Proficiency in accounting software.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Sri Venkateswara College Delhi Junior Assistant-cum-Caretaker Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 02-08-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Sri Venkateswara College Delhi Junior Assistant-cum-Caretaker Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Assistant-cum-Caretaker post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 02-08-2026. Ensure your application reaches the college before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's Degree from a recognized university and have proficiency in computer operations and accounting software, along with typing skills.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Assistant-cum-Caretaker position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this recruitment is 40 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Assistant-cum-Caretaker role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 19,900 per month, plus Dearness Allowance (DA).

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Junior Assistant-cum-Caretaker post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Written Test followed by an Interview. Candidates must perform well in both stages.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted via Email. Candidates need to send their complete application along with required documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q8. What are the typing speed requirements for the Junior Assistant-cum-Caretaker post?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to have English Typing speed of 35 words per minute or Hindi Typing speed of 30 words per minute.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for a Contractual position at Sri Venkateswara College Delhi.

faq.question: Q10. Where is Sri Venkateswara College Delhi located?
faq.answer: Sri Venkateswara College Delhi is located in New Delhi, with the pincode 110021.
